user.title: Connect to VerdiGrow
user.description: VerdiGrow URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.7:8000 direct, or your https proxy URL) and the API token from VerdiGrow → Garden Setup → API access. Uncheck Verify SSL for a self-signed/untrusted https cert.

data.verify_ssl: Verify SSL certificate (uncheck for self-signed / untrusted proxy certs)

abort.already_configured: This VerdiGrow instance is already configured.

init.title: VerdiGrow — connection & update frequency
init.description: Edit the connection here without removing the integration. Change the URL/token if your VerdiGrow moved (e.g. LAN → cloud). Readings are pushed on the interval below (default hourly — don't set it too low or you'll flood the database). Map sensors to metrics in the VerdiGrow panel.

data.verify_ssl: Verify SSL certificate (uncheck for self-signed / untrusted proxy certs)
